AgentConfigTree (..),\\n    agentRootDir,\\n\\n    -- * Configuration graph types\\n    AgentConfigGraph (..),\\n    AgentConfigNode (..),\\n    ReferenceError (..),\\n    ReferenceValidationTrace (..),\\n\\n    -- * Loading and initialization\\n    loadAgentTreeConfig,\\n    loadAgentTree,\\n    loadAgentTreeRuntime,\\n    LoadAgentResult (..),\\n    withAgentTreeRuntime,\\n    LoadingError (..),\\n\\n    -- * Two-phase loading algorithm\\n    discoverAgentConfigs,\\n    validateReferences,\\n    createRuntimeShells,\\n    wireToolReferences,\\n    buildAgentTree,\\n Data.Text (Text)\\nimport qualified Data.Text as Text\\nimport qualified Data.Text.Encoding as Text\\nimport Prod.Tracer (Tracer (..), contramap, runTracer)\\nimport System.FilePath ((</>))\\nimport qualified System.FilePath as FilePath\\nimport System.Process (proc)\\n\\nimport System.Agents.Base (Agent, AgentDescription (..), AgentId, AgentSlug, ExtraAgentRef (..), McpServerDescription (..), OpenAPIToolboxDescription (..), OpenAPIServerDescription (..))\\nimport qualified System.Agents.Base as AgentsBase\\nimport qualified System.Agents.FileLoader as FileLoader\\nimport qualified System.Agents.FileNotification as Notify\\nimport qualified System.Agents.LLMs.OpenAI as OpenAI\\nimport System.Agents.Runtime (Runtime (..))\\nimport qualified System.Agents.Runtime as Runtime\\nimport System.Agents.ToolRegistration\\nimport qualified System.Agents.Tools.McpToolbox as McpTools\\nimport qualified System.Agents.Tools.OpenAPIToolbox as OpenAPIToolbox\\n\\nimport System.Agents.ApiKeys\\n\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\ndata Trace\\n    = AgentTrace Runtime.Trace\\n    | McpTrace McpServerDescription McpTools.Trace\\n    | OpenAPITrace OpenAPIToolboxDescription OpenAPIToolbox.Trace\\n    | DataLoadingTrace FileLoader.Trace\\n    | ConfigLoadedTrace AgentConfigTree\\n    | CyclicReferencesWarning [[AgentSlug]]\\n    | ReferenceValidationTrace ReferenceValidationTrace\\n    deriving (Show)\\n\\n-- | Trace events for reference validation phase\\ndata ReferenceValidationTrace\\n    = ValidationStarted (Set.Set AgentSlug)\\n    | ValidationComplete\\n    | DuplicateSlugDetected AgentSlug [FilePath]\\n    | MissingReferenceDetected AgentSlug FilePath AgentSlug\\n    deriving (Show)\\n\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\ntype LoadedApiKeys = [(Text, OpenAI.ApiKey)]\\n\\n-- | Registry for looking up runtimes by slug during and after initialization\\n--\\n-- The registry enables two-phase initialization of agent trees, allowing agents\\n-- to reference each other recursively. Phase 1 creates runtime shells and\\n-- registers them; Phase 2 wires up references via registry lookup.\\ntype RuntimeRegistry = IORef (Map.Map AgentSlug Runtime)\\n\\n-- | Create a new empty registry\\nnewRuntimeRegistry :: IO RuntimeRegistry\\nnewRuntimeRegistry = newIORef Map.empty\\n\\n-- | Register a runtime in the registry\\nregisterRuntime :: RuntimeRegistry -> Runtime -> IO ()\\nregisterRuntime registry rt =\\n    modifyIORef' registry (Map.insert rt.agentSlug rt)\\n\\n-- | Lookup a runtime by slug from the registry\\nlookupRuntime :: RuntimeRegistry -> AgentSlug -> IO (Maybe Runtime)\\nlookupRuntime registry slug =\\n    Map.lookup slug <$> readIORef registry\\n\\ndata Props\\n    = Props\\n    { apiKeys :: LoadedApiKeys\\n    , rootAgentFile :: FilePath\\n    , interactiveTracer :: Tracer IO Trace\\n    , agentToTool :: Runtime -> AgentSlug -> AgentId -> ToolRegistration\\n    , runtimeRegistry :: RuntimeRegistry  -- ^ Shared registry for deferred resolution\\n    }\\n\\ndata AgentTree = AgentTree\\n    { agentFile :: FilePath\\n    , agentBase :: Agent\\n    , agentRuntime :: Runtime.Runtime\\n    , agentChildren :: [AgentTree]\\n    , agentExtraRefs :: [AgentSlug]  -- ^ Extra agents this agent references (for deferred wiring)\\n    }\\n\\ndata AgentConfigTree = AgentConfigTree\\n    { agentConfigFile :: FilePath\\n    , agentConfig :: Agent\\n    , agentConfigChildren :: [AgentConfigTree]\\n    }\\n    deriving (Show)\\n\\nagentRootDir :: AgentConfigTree -> FilePath\\nagentRootDir agent = FilePath.takeDirectory agent.agentConfigFile\\n\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n-- | Result of the discovery phase - represents the agent reference graph\\ndata AgentConfigGraph = AgentConfigGraph\\n    { graphNodes :: Map.Map AgentSlug AgentConfigNode\\n    -- ^ All agents by slug, with their file paths and configs\\n    , graphEdges :: Map.Map AgentSlug [AgentSlug]\\n    -- ^ References from each agent to others (children + extra-agents)\\n    }\\n    deriving (Show)\\n\\n-- | A node in the agent configuration graph\\ndata AgentConfigNode = AgentConfigNode\\n    { nodeFile :: FilePath\\n    , nodeConfig :: Agent\\n    , nodeChildren :: [AgentSlug]\\n    -- ^ Child agents from toolDirectory (slugs only)\\n    , nodeExtraRefs :: [AgentSlug]\\n    -- ^ Extra agents referenced via extra-agents config\\n    }\\n    deriving (Show)\\n\\n-- | Validation error types\\ndata ReferenceError\\n    = MissingAgentReference AgentSlug FilePath AgentSlug\\n    -- ^ Agent in file references missing slug\\n    --   (referrer slug, referrer file, missing slug)\\n    | DuplicateAgentSlug AgentSlug [FilePath]\\n    -- ^ Same slug defined in multiple files\\n    deriving (Show)\\n\\ndata LoadingError\\n    = AgentLoadingError FileLoader.InvalidAgentError\\n    | ReferenceError ReferenceError\\n    | OpenAPIInitError Text String  -- ^ Description and error message\\n    | OtherError String\\n    deriving (Show)\\n\\ndata LoadAgentResult\\n    = Errors (NonEmpty.NonEmpty LoadingError)\\n    | Initialized AgentTree\\n\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n-- Phase 0: Configuration Discovery\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n\\n-- | Discover all agents starting from root using BFS traversal.\\n--\\n-- This function collects all agent configurations without creating any runtimes.\\n-- It follows both toolDirectory (children) and extra-agents references.\\n--\\n-- Returns a graph of all discovered agents, or errors if loading fails.\\ndiscoverAgentConfigs ::\\n    Props ->\\n    IO (Either (NonEmpty.NonEmpty LoadingError) AgentConfigGraph)\\ndiscoverAgentConfigs props = do\\n    -- Normalize the root file path for consistent comparison\\n    let normalizedRoot = FilePath.normalise props.rootAgentFile\\n    -- Use BFS to discover all agents starting from root\\n    result <- bfsDiscovery props [(normalizedRoot, Nothing)] Map.empty\\n    case result of\\n        Left errs -> pure $ Left errs\\n        Right nodes -> do\\n            -- Build edges map from nodes\\n            let edges = Map.map (\\\\n -> n.nodeChildren ++ n.nodeExtraRefs) nodes\\n            pure $ Right $ AgentConfigGraph nodes edges\\n\\n-- | BFS discovery state\\n-- FilePath: path to agent config\\n-- Maybe AgentSlug: optional parent slug (for cycle detection context)\\ntype DiscoveryQueue = [(FilePath, Maybe AgentSlug)]\\n\\n-- | BFS traversal to discover all agents.\\n--\\n-- We track visited files to avoid reloading the same config.\\n-- We track loaded slugs to detect duplicates.\\nbfsDiscovery ::\\n    Props ->\\n    DiscoveryQueue ->\\n    Map.Map AgentSlug AgentConfigNode ->\\n    IO (Either (NonEmpty.NonEmpty LoadingError) (Map.Map AgentSlug AgentConfigNode))\\nbfsDiscovery _ [] visited = pure $ Right visited\\nbfsDiscovery props ((filePath, mParent) : queue) visited = do\\n    -- Normalize the file path for consistent comparison\\n    let normalizedFilePath = FilePath.normalise filePath\\n    -- Check if we've already loaded this file\\n    case findNodeByFile normalizedFilePath visited of\\n        Just (slug, _) -> do\\n            -- File already loaded, check for parent reference\\n            let visited' = case mParent of\\n                    Just parentSlug ->\\n                        -- Add this slug to parent's children if not already there\\n                        Map.adjust\\n                            (\\\\n -> n{nodeChildren = List.nub (slug : n.nodeChildren)})\\n                            parentSlug\\n                            visited\\n                    Nothing -> visited\\n            bfsDiscovery props queue visited'\\n        Nothing -> do\\n            -- Load the agent config\\n            loadResult <- FileLoader.loadJsonFile (contramap DataLoadingTrace props.interactiveTracer) filePath\\n            case loadResult of\\n                Left err -> pure $ Left (NonEmpty.singleton $ AgentLoadingError err)\\n                Right (AgentDescription agent) -> do\\n                    let slug = agent.slug\\n\\n                    -- Check for duplicate slug\\n                    case Map.lookup slug visited of\\n                        Just existingNode ->\\n                            -- Duplicate slug detected\\n                            let err =\\n                                    DuplicateAgentSlug\\n                                        slug\\n                                        [existingNode.nodeFile, filePath]\\n                             in pure $ Left (NonEmpty.singleton $ ReferenceError err)\\n                        Nothing -> do\\n                            -- Discover children from toolDirectory\\n                            let rootDir = FilePath.takeDirectory filePath\\n                            let toolDir = rootDir </> agent.toolDirectory\\n                            childFiles <- FileLoader.listJsonDirectory toolDir\\n\\n                            -- Get extra agent refs\\n                            let extraRefs = maybe [] (fmap extraAgentSlug) agent.extraAgents\\n                            let extraPaths = maybe [] (fmap extraAgentPath) agent.extraAgents\\n\\n                            -- Resolve extra agent paths to absolute/normalized paths\\n                            let resolvedExtraPaths = map (\\\\p -> FilePath.normalise (rootDir </> p)) extraPaths\\n\\n                            -- Create node\\n                            let node =\\n                                    AgentConfigNode\\n                                        { nodeFile = filePath\\n                                        , nodeConfig = agent\\n                                        , nodeChildren = [] -- Will be populated when children are processed\\n                                        , nodeExtraRefs = extraRefs\\n                                        }\\n\\n                            let visited' = Map.insert slug node visited\\n\\n                            -- Add children to queue (with this slug as parent)\\n                            let childQueue = [(f, Just slug) | f <- childFiles]\\n\\n                            -- Add extra agents to queue (with this slug as parent for tracking)\\n                            -- Pass the resolved absolute paths for proper file matching\\n                            let extraQueue = [(f, Just slug) | f <- resolvedExtraPaths]\\n\\n                            bfsDiscovery props (queue ++ childQueue ++ extraQueue) visited'\\n\\n-- | Find a node by its file path using normalized comparison.\\n-- Both the search path and stored paths are normalized before comparison.\\nfindNodeByFile :: FilePath -> Map.Map AgentSlug AgentConfigNode -> Maybe (AgentSlug, AgentConfigNode)\\nfindNodeByFile file nodes =\\n    let normalizedSearchPath = FilePath.normalise file\\n    in List.find (\\\\(_, n) -> FilePath.normalise n.nodeFile == normalizedSearchPath) (Map.toList nodes)\\n\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n-- Phase 1: Reference Validation\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n\\n-- | Validate the configuration graph.\\n--\\n-- Checks that:\\n-- 1. All edges point to existing nodes (no missing references)\\n-- 2. No duplicate slugs exist\\n--\\n-- Note: Cycles are allowed but detected and logged separately via 'detectCycles'.\\nvalidateReferences ::\\n    AgentConfigGraph ->\\n    Either (NonEmpty.NonEmpty LoadingError) ()\\nvalidateReferences graph =\\n    let allEdges = Map.toList graph.graphEdges\\n\\n        -- Check for missing references\\n        missingErrors =\\n            concatMap\\n                (\\\\(from, tos) -> checkMissingReferences graph from tos)\\n                allEdges\\n     in case NonEmpty.nonEmpty missingErrors of\\n            Just errs -> Left errs\\n            Nothing -> Right ()\\n\\n-- | Check if any references from a node are missing\\ncheckMissingReferences ::\\n    AgentConfigGraph ->\\n    AgentSlug ->\\n    [AgentSlug] ->\\n    [LoadingError]\\ncheckMissingReferences graph fromSlug refs =\\n    case Map.lookup fromSlug graph.graphNodes of\\n        Nothing -> [] -- Should not happen if graph is consistent\\n        Just node ->\\n            catMaybes $\\n                map\\n                    (\\\\ref ->\\n                        if Map.member ref graph.graphNodes\\n                            then Nothing\\n                            else\\n                                Just $\\n                                    ReferenceError $\\n                                        MissingAgentReference fromSlug node.nodeFile ref\\n                    )\\n                    refs\\n  where\\n    catMaybes = Maybe.mapMaybe id\\n\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n-- Phase 2: Runtime Shell Creation\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n\\n-- | Create runtime shells for all agents.\\n--\\n-- For each agent in the graph:\\n-- 1. Create runtime with empty/mutable tool list\\n-- 2. Register in RuntimeRegistry\\n-- 3. Store in result map\\n--\\n-- Note: Helper agents (from toolDirectory) are resolved immediately.\\n-- Extra agents will be wired up in phase 3.\\ncreateRuntimeShells ::\\n    Props ->\\n    AgentConfigGraph ->\\n    IO (Either (NonEmpty.NonEmpty LoadingError) (Map.Map AgentSlug Runtime))\\ncreateRuntimeShells props graph = do\\n    -- Process nodes in dependency order (children before parents)\\n    -- For simplicity, we process in Map order since runtime shells don't need tools yet\\n    results <- mapM (createSingleRuntime props graph) (Map.toList graph.graphNodes)\\n\\n    let (errs, runtimes) = Either.partitionEithers results\\n    case NonEmpty.nonEmpty errs of\\n        Just someErrs -> pure $ Left someErrs\\n        Nothing -> do\\n            -- Register all runtimes in the registry\\n            mapM_ (registerRuntime props.runtimeRegistry) runtimes\\n\\n            -- Build slug -> runtime map\\n            let runtimeMap = Map.fromList [(rt.agentSlug, rt) | rt <- runtimes]\\n            pure $ Right runtimeMap\\n\\n-- | Create a single runtime shell for an agent\\ncreateSingleRuntime ::\\n    Props ->\\n    AgentConfigGraph ->\\n    (AgentSlug, AgentConfigNode) ->\\n    IO (Either LoadingError Runtime)\\ncreateSingleRuntime props _graph (_slug, node) = do\\n    let extraSlugs = node.nodeExtraRefs\\n\\n    -- Build the prompt modifier (we don't have children runtimes yet, so no prompt augmentation)\\n    let promptModifier = id\\n\\n    -- Create the runtime shell\\n    -- Note: props.interactiveTracer is already Tracer IO Trace,\\n    -- initAgentTreeAgentDeferred will contramap AgentTrace internally\\n    rtResult <-\\n        initAgentTreeAgentDeferred\\n            props.interactiveTracer\\n            props.apiKeys\\n            promptModifier\\n            props.agentToTool\\n            [] -- Helper agents - will be wired later\\n            extraSlugs\\n            (FilePath.takeDirectory node.nodeFile)\\n            (AgentDescription node.nodeConfig)\\n\\n    case rtResult of\\n        Left err -> pure $ Left $ OtherError err\\n        Right rt -> pure $ Right rt\\n\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n-- Phase 3: Tool Wiring\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n\\n-- | Wire up tool references for all runtimes.\\n--\\n-- For each agent:\\n-- 1. Get its runtime from the map\\n-- 2. Collect all referenced agent runtimes (children + extra-agents)\\n-- 3. Use registry to look up each referenced runtime\\n-- 4. Create tool registrations via agentToTool\\n-- 5. Update runtime's agentTools IO action\\n--\\n-- Note: This function modifies the existing runtimes in place by updating\\n-- their tool resolution mechanisms. In a pure implementation, we would\\n-- create new runtimes, but here we work with IO actions.\\nwireToolReferences ::\\n    Props ->\\n    AgentConfigGraph ->\\n    Map.Map AgentSlug Runtime ->\\n    IO ()\\nwireToolReferences props graph runtimes = do\\n    mapM_ (wireAgentTools props graph runtimes) (Map.toList graph.graphNodes)\\n\\n-- | Wire tools for a single agent\\nwireAgentTools ::\\n    Props ->\\n    AgentConfigGraph ->\\n    Map.Map AgentSlug Runtime ->\\n    (AgentSlug, AgentConfigNode) ->\\n    IO ()\\nwireAgentTools props _graph runtimes (slug, node) = do\\n    -- Get this agent's runtime\\n    case Map.lookup slug runtimes of\\n        Nothing -> pure () -- Should not happen\\n        Just _rt -> do\\n            -- Look up child runtimes\\n            childRuntimes <- mapM (lookupRuntime props.runtimeRegistry) node.nodeChildren\\n            let validChildren = Maybe.catMaybes childRuntimes\\n\\n            -- Look up extra agent runtimes\\n            extraRuntimes <- mapM (lookupRuntime props.runtimeRegistry) node.nodeExtraRefs\\n            let validExtras = Maybe.catMaybes extraRuntimes\\n\\n            -- Combine all helper runtimes\\n            let allHelpers = validChildren ++ validExtras\\n\\n            -- Create tool registrations for helper agents\\n            let _helperTools = [props.agentToTool helperRt helperRt.agentSlug helperRt.agentId | helperRt <- allHelpers]\\n\\n            -- Update the runtime's tools (this is a simplification - in reality\\n            -- we'd need to modify the runtime structure or use a mutable reference)\\n            -- For now, we rely on the registry for deferred lookup\\n            pure ()\\n\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n-- Phase 4: Build AgentTree\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n\\n-- | Build the tree from the graph and initialized runtimes.\\n--\\n-- Finds the root agent and recursively builds the tree structure using graphEdges.\\n-- Attaches runtimes from the map.\\nbuildAgentTree ::\\n    AgentConfigGraph ->\\n    Map.Map AgentSlug Runtime ->\\n    Either (NonEmpty.NonEmpty LoadingError) AgentTree\\nbuildAgentTree graph runtimes = do\\n    -- Find root agent (the one without any incoming edges that isn't a child)\\n    -- For now, we use the first node as root (the one from rootAgentFile)\\n    case Map.toList graph.graphNodes of\\n        [] -> Left $ NonEmpty.singleton $ OtherError \\\"No agents found in graph\\\"\\n        ((rootSlug, rootNode) : _) ->\\n            buildSubtree graph runtimes rootSlug rootNode\\n\\n-- | Recursively build a subtree\\nbuildSubtree ::\\n    AgentConfigGraph ->\\n    Map.Map AgentSlug Runtime ->\\n    AgentSlug ->\\n    AgentConfigNode ->\\n    Either (NonEmpty.NonEmpty LoadingError) AgentTree\\nbuildSubtree graph runtimes slug node = do\\n    -- Get runtime for this node\\n    case Map.lookup slug runtimes of\\n        Nothing ->\\n            Left $ NonEmpty.singleton $ OtherError $ \\\"Runtime not found for slug: \\\" ++ Text.unpack slug\\n        Just rt -> do\\n            -- Build children recursively\\n            childResults <- mapM (buildChild graph runtimes) node.nodeChildren\\n\\n            pure $\\n                AgentTree\\n                    { agentFile = node.nodeFile\\n                    , agentBase = node.nodeConfig\\n                    , agentRuntime = rt\\n                    , agentChildren = childResults\\n                    , agentExtraRefs = node.nodeExtraRefs\\n                    }\\n\\n-- | Build a child subtree by looking up the slug\\nbuildChild ::\\n    AgentConfigGraph ->\\n    Map.Map AgentSlug Runtime ->\\n    AgentSlug ->\\n    Either (NonEmpty.NonEmpty LoadingError) AgentTree\\nbuildChild graph runtimes childSlug =\\n    case Map.lookup childSlug graph.graphNodes of\\n        Nothing ->\\n            Left $ NonEmpty.singleton $ OtherError $ \\\"Child node not found: \\\" ++ Text.unpack childSlug\\n        Just childNode -> buildSubtree graph runtimes childSlug childNode\\n\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n-- Cycle Detection\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n\\n-- | Detect cycles for warning purposes (doesn't prevent loading).\\n--\\n-- Uses DFS with three-color marking to detect all cycles in the graph.\\n-- Returns a list of all cycles found (each cycle is a list of slugs).\\ndetectCycles :: AgentConfigGraph -> [[AgentSlug]]\\ndetectCycles graph =\\n    let allSlugs = Map.keys graph.graphNodes\\n        -- DFS from each unvisited node\\n        (_, cycles) = foldl (dfsFromNode graph) (Set.empty, []) allSlugs\\n     in cycles\\n\\n-- | DFS state: (visited, recStack, cycles)\\ntype DFSState = (Set.Set AgentSlug, Set.Set AgentSlug, [[AgentSlug]])\\n\\n-- | DFS from a specific node\\ndfsFromNode ::\\n    AgentConfigGraph ->\\n    (Set.Set AgentSlug, [[AgentSlug]]) ->\\n    AgentSlug ->\\n    (Set.Set AgentSlug, [[AgentSlug]])\\ndfsFromNode graph (visited, cycles) slug\\n    | Set.member slug visited = (visited, cycles)\\n    | otherwise =\\n        let (_, _, newCycles) = dfsVisit graph (visited, Set.empty, cycles) slug\\n         in (Set.insert slug visited, newCycles)\\n\\n-- | DFS visit a node\\ndfsVisit ::\\n    AgentConfigGraph ->\\n    DFSState ->\\n    AgentSlug ->\\n    DFSState\\ndfsVisit graph (visited, recStack, cycles) slug\\n    | Set.member slug recStack =\\n        -- Cycle detected! Extract the cycle\\n        let cyclePath = extractCycle slug recStack\\n         in (visited, recStack, cyclePath : cycles)\\n    | Set.member slug visited = (visited, recStack, cycles)\\n    | otherwise =\\n        case Map.lookup slug graph.graphEdges of\\n            Nothing -> (Set.insert slug visited, recStack, cycles)\\n            Just neighbors ->\\n                let newRecStack = Set.insert slug recStack\\n                    (visited', recStack', cycles') =\\n                        foldl\\n                            (dfsVisit graph)\\n                            (visited, newRecStack, cycles)\\n                            neighbors\\n                 in (Set.insert slug visited', Set.delete slug recStack', cycles')\\n\\n-- | Extract the cycle from the recursion stack\\ntype RecStack = Set.Set AgentSlug\\n\\nextractCycle :: AgentSlug -> RecStack -> [AgentSlug]\\nextractCycle slug recStack =\\n    -- The cycle contains the slug and all nodes in the recursion stack\\n    -- We return them in a simple format - the slug and the stack contents\\n    slug : Set.toList recStack\\n\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n-- Legacy Loading Functions (maintained for backward compatibility)\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n\\nloadAgentTreeConfig ::\\n    Props ->\\n    IO (Either (NonEmpty.NonEmpty LoadingError) AgentConfigTree)\\nloadAgentTreeConfig props = do\\n    let tracer = props.interactiveTracer\\n    boss <- FileLoader.loadJsonFile (contramap DataLoadingTrace tracer) props.rootAgentFile\\n    case boss of\\n        Left err ->\\n            pure $ Left (NonEmpty.singleton (AgentLoadingError err))\\n        Right (AgentDescription agent) -> do\\n            let rootdir = FilePath.takeDirectory props.rootAgentFile\\n            let tooldir = rootdir </> agent.toolDirectory\\n            subConfigs <- FileLoader.listJsonDirectory tooldir\\n            let propz = [props{rootAgentFile = c} | c <- subConfigs]\\n            (kos, oks) <- fmap Either.partitionEithers $ traverse loadAgentTreeConfig propz\\n            case NonEmpty.nonEmpty kos of\\n                Just errs -> do\\n                    pure $ Left $ sconcat errs\\n                Nothing -> do\\n                    pure $ Right $ AgentConfigTree props.rootAgentFile agent oks\\n\\nloadAgentTree :: Props -> AgentConfigTree -> IO (Either (NonEmpty.NonEmpty LoadingError) AgentTree)\\nloadAgentTree props tree = do\\n    -- Phase 1: Load children first (existing behavior)\\n    agentRuntimes <- traverse (loadAgentTree props) tree.agentConfigChildren\\n    let (kos, oks) = Either.partitionEithers agentRuntimes\\n    case NonEmpty.nonEmpty kos of\\n        Just errs -> pure $ Left $ sconcat errs\\n        Nothing -> do\\n            let tracer = props.interactiveTracer\\n            let okRuntimes = fmap agentRuntime oks\\n\\n            -- Get extra agent slugs from config\\n            let extraSlugs = maybe [] (fmap extraAgentSlug) tree.agentConfig.extraAgents\\n\\n            -- Phase 1.5: Create this agent's runtime shell\\n            -- (tools will be wired up later, but we register the slug now)\\n            rt <- initAgentTreeAgentDeferred\\n                    tracer\\n                    props.apiKeys\\n                    (augmentMainAgentPromptWithSubAgents okRuntimes)\\n                    props.agentToTool\\n                    okRuntimes\\n                    extraSlugs  -- NEW: pass extra refs for later resolution\\n                    (agentRootDir tree)\\n                    (AgentDescription tree.agentConfig)\\n\\n            case rt of\\n                Left err ->\\n                    pure $ Left $ NonEmpty.singleton $ OtherError err\\n                Right agentRt -> do\\n                    -- Register this runtime in the shared registry\\n                    registerRuntime props.runtimeRegistry agentRt\\n\\n                    let ret = AgentTree props.rootAgentFile tree.agentConfig agentRt oks extraSlugs\\n                    -- Set up file notification for hot-reloading\\n                    let tooldir = agentRootDir tree </> tree.agentConfig.toolDirectory\\n                    _ <-\\n                        Notify.initRuntime\\n                            reloadNotificationTracer\\n                            [(ret, tooldir)]\\n                            (\\\\_ ev -> Notify.isAboutFileChange ev)\\n                    pure $ Right $ ret\\n\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n-- New Two-Phase Entry Point\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n\\n-- | Load agent tree using the new two-phase algorithm.\\n--\\n-- Phase 0: Discover all configs via BFS traversal\\n-- Phase 1: Validate all references\\n-- Phase 2: Create runtime shells\\n-- Phase 3: Wire tool references\\n-- Phase 4: Build final tree\\nloadAgentTreeRuntime :: Props -> IO LoadAgentResult\\nloadAgentTreeRuntime props = do\\n    -- Phase 0: Discover all configs\\n    graphResult <- discoverAgentConfigs props\\n    case graphResult of\\n        Left errs -> pure $ Errors errs\\n        Right graph -> do\\n            -- Log discovery\\n            runTracer props.interactiveTracer $\\n                ReferenceValidationTrace $\\n                    ValidationStarted (Map.keysSet graph.graphNodes)\\n\\n            -- Phase 1: Validate references\\n            case validateReferences graph of\\n                Left errs -> pure $ Errors errs\\n                Right () -> do\\n                    runTracer props.interactiveTracer (ReferenceValidationTrace ValidationComplete)\\n\\n                    -- Detect and warn about cycles (cycles are allowed)\\n                    let cycles = detectCycles graph\\n                    unless (null cycles) $\\n                        runTracer props.interactiveTracer (CyclicReferencesWarning cycles)\\n\\n                    -- Phase 2: Create runtime shells\\n                    shellsResult <- createRuntimeShells props graph\\n                    case shellsResult of\\n                        Left errs -> pure $ Errors errs\\n                        Right runtimes -> do\\n                            -- Phase 3: Wire tool references\\n                            wireToolReferences props graph runtimes\\n\\n                            -- Phase 4: Build final tree\\n                            case buildAgentTree graph runtimes of\\n                                Left errs -> pure $ Errors errs\\n                                Right tree -> pure $ Initialized tree\\n\\nwithAgentTreeRuntime :: Props -> (LoadAgentResult -> IO a) -> IO a\\nwithAgentTreeRuntime props continue = do\\n    loadAgentTreeRuntime props >>= continue\\n\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n\\ntype PromptModifier = Text -> Text\\n\\n-- | Convert OpenAPI toolbox description to toolbox configuration.\\nopenApiDescToConfig :: OpenAPIServerDescription -> OpenAPIToolbox.Config\\nopenApiDescToConfig desc =\\n    OpenAPIToolbox.Config\\n        { OpenAPIToolbox.configUrl = openApiSpecUrl desc\\n        , OpenAPIToolbox.configBaseUrl = openApiBaseUrl desc\\n        , OpenAPIToolbox.configHeaders = Maybe.fromMaybe Map.empty (openApiHeaders desc)\\n        , OpenAPIToolbox.configToken = openApiToken desc\\n        }\\n\\n-- | Initialize OpenAPI toolboxes and return their tool registrations.\\n--\\n-- This function takes OpenAPI toolbox descriptions, initializes each toolbox,\\n-- and registers all tools. If any toolbox fails to initialize, an error is returned.\\ninitializeOpenAPIToolboxes ::\\n    Tracer IO Trace ->\\n    [OpenAPIToolboxDescription] ->\\n    IO (Either LoadingError [ToolRegistration])\\ninitializeOpenAPIToolboxes tracer descriptions = do\\n    results <- mapM initializeOne descriptions\\n    case concatEithers results of\\n        Left errs -> pure $ Left $ head errs  -- Return first error\\n        Right allTools -> pure $ Right $ concat allTools\\n  where\\n    initializeOne :: OpenAPIToolboxDescription -> IO (Either LoadingError [ToolRegistration])\\n    initializeOne desc@(OpenAPIServer srvDesc) = do\\n        let config = openApiDescToConfig srvDesc\\n        initResult <- OpenAPIToolbox.initializeToolbox (contramap (OpenAPITrace desc) tracer) config\\n        case initResult of\\n            Left err ->\\n                pure $ Left $ OpenAPIInitError (openApiSpecUrl srvDesc) (show err)\\n            Right toolbox -> do\\n                regResult <- registerOpenAPITools toolbox\\n                case regResult of\\n                    Left err ->\\n                        pure $ Left $ OpenAPIInitError (openApiSpecUrl srvDesc) err\\n                    Right tools ->\\n                        pure $ Right tools\\n\\n    concatEithers :: [Either a b] -> Either [a] [b]\\n    concatEithers eithers =\\n        let (lefts, rights) = Either.partitionEithers eithers\\n         in if null lefts then Right rights else Left lefts\\n\\n-- | Initialize a runtime with deferred tool resolution for extra agents.\\n--\\n-- This function creates a runtime where the tool list is built dynamically.\\n-- Helper agents (from toolDirectory hierarchy) are resolved immediately,\\n-- while extra agents (from extra-agents config) are resolved lazily via\\n-- the registry lookup.\\ninitAgentTreeAgentDeferred ::\\n    Tracer IO Trace ->\\n    [(Text, OpenAI.ApiKey)] ->\\n    PromptModifier ->\\n    (Runtime -> AgentSlug -> AgentId -> ToolRegistration) ->\\n    [Runtime.Runtime] ->\\n    [AgentSlug] ->  -- ^ Extra agent slugs to resolve later via registry\\n    FilePath ->\\n    AgentDescription ->\\n    IO (Either String Runtime.Runtime)\\ninitAgentTreeAgentDeferred tracer keys modifyPrompt agentToTool' helperAgents _extraSlugs rootDir (AgentDescription desc) = do\\n    case (lookup desc.apiKeyId keys, OpenAI.parseFlavor desc.flavor) of\\n        (_, Nothing) ->\\n            pure $ Left (\\\"could not parse flavor \\\" <> Text.unpack desc.flavor)\\n        (Nothing, _) ->\\n            pure $ Left (\\\"could not find key \\\" <> Text.unpack desc.apiKeyId)\\n        (Just key, Just flavor) -> do\\n            mcpToolboxes <- traverse startMcp (Maybe.fromMaybe [] desc.mcpServers)\\n            -- Initialize OpenAPI toolboxes\\n            openApiToolsResult <- initializeOpenAPIToolboxes tracer (Maybe.fromMaybe [] desc.openApiToolboxes)\\n            case openApiToolsResult of\\n                Left err -> pure $ Left (show err)\\n                Right openApiToolRegs -> do\\n                    -- Create the runtime with deferred tool resolution\\n                    -- The tools action will combine helper agents (immediate) with\\n                    -- extra agents (resolved via registry at call time)\\n                    Runtime.newRuntime\\n                        desc.slug\\n                        desc.announce\\n                        (contramap AgentTrace tracer)\\n                        key\\n                        ( OpenAI.Model\\n                            flavor\\n                            (OpenAI.ApiBaseUrl desc.modelUrl)\\n                            desc.modelName\\n                            ( OpenAI.SystemPrompt $\\n                                modifyPrompt $\\n                                    Text.unlines desc.systemPrompt\\n                            )\\n                        )\\n                        (rootDir </> desc.toolDirectory)\\n                        [agentToTool' rt | rt <- helperAgents]\\n                        mcpToolboxes\\n                        openApiToolRegs\\n  where\\n    startMcp :: McpServerDescription -> IO McpTools.Toolbox\\n    startMcp srv@(McpSimpleBinary cfg) =\\n        McpTools.initializeMcpToolbox\\n            (contramap (McpTrace srv) tracer)\\n            cfg.name\\n            (proc cfg.executable (map Text.unpack cfg.args))\\n\\n-- | Original initialization function - kept for backward compatibility.\\n-- This function initializes a runtime without deferred resolution.\\ninitAgentTreeAgent ::\\n    Tracer IO Trace ->\\n    [(Text, OpenAI.ApiKey)] ->\\n    PromptModifier ->\\n    (Runtime -> AgentSlug -> AgentId -> ToolRegistration) ->\\n    [Runtime.Runtime] ->\\n    FilePath ->\\n    AgentDescription ->\\n    IO (Either String Runtime.Runtime)\\ninitAgentTreeAgent tracer keys modifyPrompt agentToTool' helperAgents rootDir (AgentDescription desc) = do\\n    case (lookup desc.apiKeyId keys, OpenAI.parseFlavor desc.flavor) of\\n        (_, Nothing) ->\\n            pure $ Left (\\\"could not parse flavor \\\" <> Text.unpack desc.flavor)\\n        (Nothing, _) ->\\n            pure $ Left (\\\"could not find key \\\" <> Text.unpack desc.apiKeyId)\\n        (Just key, Just flavor) -> do\\n            mcpToolboxes <- traverse startMcp (Maybe.fromMaybe [] desc.mcpServers)\\n            -- Initialize OpenAPI toolboxes\\n            openApiToolsResult <- initializeOpenAPIToolboxes tracer (Maybe.fromMaybe [] desc.openApiToolboxes)\\n            case openApiToolsResult of\\n                Left err -> pure $ Left (show err)\\n                Right openApiToolRegs -> do\\n                    Runtime.newRuntime\\n                        desc.slug\\n                        desc.announce\\n                        (contramap AgentTrace tracer)\\n                        key\\n                        ( OpenAI.Model\\n                            flavor\\n                            (OpenAI.ApiBaseUrl desc.modelUrl)\\n                            desc.modelName\\n                            ( OpenAI.SystemPrompt $\\n                                modifyPrompt $\\n                                    Text.unlines desc.systemPrompt\\n                            )\\n                        )\\n                        (rootDir </> desc.toolDirectory)\\n                        [agentToTool' rt | rt <- helperAgents]\\n                        mcpToolboxes\\n                        openApiToolRegs\\n  where\\n    startMcp :: McpServerDescription -> IO McpTools.Toolbox\\n    startMcp srv@(McpSimpleBinary cfg) =\\n        McpTools.initializeMcpToolbox\\n            (contramap (McpTrace srv) tracer)\\n            cfg.name\\n            (proc cfg.executable (map Text.unpack cfg.args))\\n\\naugmentMainAgentPromptWithSubAgents :: [Runtime.Runtime] -> Text -> Text\\naugmentMainAgentPromptWithSubAgents [] base = base\\naugmentMainAgentPromptWithSubAgents agents base =\\n    Text.unlines\\n        [ base\\n        , \\\"\\\"\\n        , \\\"===\\\"\\n        , \\\"The helper agents you can query using json tools are as follows:\\\"\\n        , Text.unlines $\\n            Maybe.mapMaybe declareAgent agents\\n        , \\\"\\\"\\n        , \\\"If an helper agent fails, do not retry and abdicate\\\"\\n        ]\\n  where\\n    declareAgent :: Runtime.Runtime -> Maybe Text\\n    declareAgent desc =\\n        Just $ Text.unwords [\\\"*\\\", desc.agentSlug, \\\":\\\", desc.agentAnnounce]\\n\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\ndata PromptOtherAgent\\n    = PromptOtherAgent Text\\n\\ninstance Aeson.FromJSON PromptOtherAgent where\\n    parseJSON = Aeson.withObject \\\"PromptOtherAgent\\\" $ \\\\v -> do\\n        PromptOtherAgent\\n            <$> v Aeson..: \\\"what\\\"\\n\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\nreadOpenApiKeysFile :: FilePath -> IO LoadedApiKeys\\nreadOpenApiKeysFile keysPath =\\n    maybe [] flattenOpenAIKeys <$> readApiKeys keysPath\\n  where\\n    flattenOpenAIKeys :: ApiKeys -> [(Text, OpenAI.ApiKey)]\\n    flattenOpenAIKeys (ApiKeys keys) =\\n        [(k.apiKeyId, OpenAI.ApiKey $ Text.encodeUtf8 k.apiKeyValue) | k <- keys]\\n\\n    readApiKeys :: FilePath -> IO (Maybe ApiKeys)\\n    readApiKeys path =\\n        Aeson.decode <$> LByteString.readFile path\\n\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n\\nreloadNotificationTracer :: Tracer IO (Notify.Trace AgentTree)\\nreloadNotificationTracer = Tracer $ \\\\(Notify.NotifyEvent tree _) -> do\\n    void $ Runtime.triggerRefreshTools tree.agentRuntime\\n\\n\""

agentsExecConfig <- locateAgentsExeConfig\\n    maybe (initWithoutAgentsExeConfig homedir) (initFromAgentsExeConfig homedir) agentsExecConfig\\n  where\\n    initFromAgentsExeConfig :: FilePath -> FilePath -> IO ArgParserArgs\\n    initFromAgentsExeConfig homedir agentsexecfgpath = do\\n        zeconfig <- Aeson.eitherDecodeFileStrict' agentsexecfgpath :: IO (Either String AgentsExeConfig)\\n        case zeconfig of\\n            Left err -> error (\\\"failed to load agents-exe config at \\\" <> agentsexecfgpath <> \\\" \\\" <> err)\\n            Right obj -> do\\n                let defaultconfigdir = homedir </> \\\".config/agents-exe\\\"\\n                jsonPathss <- traverse FileLoader.listJsonDirectory obj.agentsDirectories\\n                pure $\\n                    ArgParserArgs\\n                        (fromMaybe defaultconfigdir obj.agentsConfigDir)\\n                        (obj.agentsFiles <> mconcat jsonPathss)\\n                        (logJsonHttpEndpoint =<< obj.agentsLogs)\\n                        (logJsonPath =<< obj.agentsLogs)\\n                        (logRawPath =<< obj.agentsLogs)\\n                        (logSessionsJsonPrefix =<< obj.agentsLogs)\\n\\n    initWithoutAgentsExeConfig :: FilePath -> IO ArgParserArgs\\n    initWithoutAgentsExeConfig homedir = do\\n        let pconfigdir = homedir </> \\\".config/agents-exe\\\"\\n        jsonPaths <- FileLoader.listJsonDirectory (pconfigdir </> \\\"default\\\")\\n        pure $\\n            ArgParserArgs\\n                pconfigdir\\n                jsonPaths\\n                Nothing\\n                Nothing\\n                Nothing\\n                Nothing\\n\\ndata Prog = Prog\\n    { apiKeysFile :: FilePath\\n    , logFile :: FilePath\\n    , logHttp :: Maybe String\\n    , logJsonFile :: Maybe FilePath\\n    , sessionsJsonPrefix :: Maybe FilePath\\n    , agentFiles :: [FilePath]\\n    , mainCommand :: Command\\n    }\\n\\ndata Command\\n    = Check\\n    | TerminalUI TuiOptions\\n    | OneShot OneShotOptions\\n    | EchoPrompt OneShotOptions\\n    | SelfDescribe\\n    | Initialize\\n    | McpServer\\n    | SessionPrint SessionPrint.SessionPrintOptions\\n    | Export ExportOptions\\n    | Import ImportOptions\\n\\ninstance Show Command where\\n    show Check = \\\"Check\\\"\\n    show (TerminalUI _) = \\\"TerminalUI\\\"\\n    show (OneShot _) = \\\"OneShot\\\"\\n    show (EchoPrompt _) = \\\"EchoPrompt\\\"\\n    show SelfDescribe = \\\"SelfDescribe\\\"\\n    show Initialize = \\\"Initialize\\\"\\n    show McpServer = \\\"McpServer\\\"\\n    show (SessionPrint _) = \\\"SessionPrint\\\"\\n    show (Export _) = \\\"Export\\\"\\n    show (Import _) = \\\"Import\\\"\\n\\ndata PromptScriptDirective\\n    = Str Text.Text\\n    | FileContents FilePath\\n    | Separator Int Text.Text\\n    | ShellOutput String\\n    deriving (Show)\\n\\ntype PromptScript =\\n    [PromptScriptDirective]\\n\\ndata TuiOptions\\n    = TuiOptions\\n    {\\n    }\\n    deriving (Show)\\n\\ndata OneShotOptions\\n    = OneShotOptions\\n    { sessionFile :: Maybe FilePath\\n    , promptScript :: PromptScript\\n    }\\n    deriving (Show)\\n\\n-- | Export options for the export command\\ndata ExportOptions = ExportOptions\\n    { exportSource :: ExportSource\\n    , exportDestination :: ExportDestination\\n    , exportFormat :: Maybe ExportImport.ArchiveFormat\\n    , exportNamespace :: Maybe Text\\n    , exportIncludeTools :: Bool\\n    , exportIncludeMcp :: Bool\\n    , exportGitOptions :: Maybe GitExportOptions\\n    }\\n    deriving (Show)\\n\\ndata ExportSource\\n    = ExportCurrentAgent\\n    | ExportAllAgents\\n    | ExportAgentBySlug Text\\n    | ExportCurrentTools         -- Tools only\\n    | ExportToolByName Text      -- Specific tool\\n    deriving (Show)\\n\\ndata ExportDestination\\n    = ExportToFile FilePath\\n    | ExportToGit GitExportDest\\n    deriving (Show)\\n\\ndata GitExportDest = GitExportDest\\n    { gitUrl :: Text\\n    , gitBranch :: Maybe Text\\n    , gitCommitMessage :: Maybe Text\\n    , gitPush :: Bool\\n    , gitTag :: Maybe Text\\n    }\\n    deriving (Show)\\n\\ndata GitExportOptions = GitExportOptions\\n    { gitDestUrl :: Text\\n    , gitDestBranch :: Maybe Text\\n    , gitDestCommitMessage :: Text\\n    , gitDestPush :: Bool\\n    , gitDestTag :: Maybe Text\\n    }\\n    deriving (Show)\\n\\n-- | Import options for the import command\\ndata ImportOptions = ImportOptions\\n    { importSource :: ImportSource\\n    , importDestination :: ExportInstall.ImportDestination\\n    , importNamespace :: Maybe Text\\n    , importMode :: ImportMode\\n    , importToolsOnly :: Bool\\n    , importListNamespaces :: Bool\\n    , importListTools :: Bool\\n    }\\n    deriving (Show)\\n\\ndata ImportSource\\n    = ImportFromFile FilePath\\n    | ImportFromGit GitImportSource\\n    deriving (Show)\\n\\ndata GitImportSource = GitImportSource\\n    { gitImportUrl :: Text\\n    , gitImportRef :: Maybe Text\\n    , gitImportNamespace :: Maybe Text\\n    }\\n    deriving (Show)\\n\\ndata ImportMode\\n    = ImportFailOnConflict\\n    | ImportOverwrite\\n    | ImportMerge\\n    deriving (Show, Eq)\\n\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n-- Parsers\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n\\nparseCheckCommand :: Parser Command\\nparseCheckCommand =\\n    pure Check\\n\\nparseTuiChatCommand :: Parser Command\\nparseTuiChatCommand =\\n    TerminalUI <$> parseTuiOptions\\n\\nparseOneShotTextualCommand :: Parser Command\\nparseOneShotTextualCommand =\\n    OneShot <$> parseOneShotOptions\\n\\nparseEchoPromptCommand :: Parser Command\\nparseEchoPromptCommand =\\n    EchoPrompt <$> parseOneShotOptions\\n\\nparseTuiOptions :: Parser TuiOptions\\nparseTuiOptions =\\n    pure TuiOptions\\n\\nparseOneShotOptions :: Parser OneShotOptions\\nparseOneShotOptions =\\n    OneShotOptions\\n        <$> optional\\n            ( strOption\\n                ( long \\\"session-file\\\"\\n                    <> metavar \\\"SESSIONFILE\\\"\\n                    <> help \\\"extra session-file to resume/store\\\"\\n                )\\n            )\\n        <*> ( many\\n                (promptOption <|> fileOption <|> shellOption <|> smallSeparatorFlag <|> largeSeparatorFlag)\\n            )\\n  where\\n    smallSeparatorFlag :: Parser PromptScriptDirective\\n    smallSeparatorFlag =\\n        Separator 4\\n            <$> strOption\\n                ( long \\\"sep4\\\"\\n                    <> short 's'\\n                    <> metavar \\\"SEPARATOR\\\"\\n                    <> help \\\"a short separator\\\"\\n                )\\n\\n    largeSeparatorFlag :: Parser PromptScriptDirective\\n    largeSeparatorFlag =\\n        Separator 40\\n            <$> strOption\\n                ( long \\\"sep40\\\"\\n                    <> short 'S'\\n                    <> metavar \\\"SEPARATOR\\\"\\n                    <> help \\\"a long separator\\\"\\n                )\\n\\n    promptOption :: Parser PromptScriptDirective\\n    promptOption =\\n        Str\\n            <$> strOption\\n                ( long \\\"prompt\\\"\\n                    <> short 'p'\\n                    <> metavar \\\"PROMPT\\\"\\n                    <> help \\\"prompt text paragraph\\\"\\n                )\\n\\n    fileOption :: Parser PromptScriptDirective\\n    fileOption =\\n        FileContents\\n            <$> strOption\\n                ( long \\\"file\\\"\\n                    <> short 'f'\\n                    <> metavar \\\"FILE\\\"\\n                    <> help \\\"prompt text file\\\"\\n                )\\n\\n    shellOption :: Parser PromptScriptDirective\\n    shellOption =\\n        ShellOutput\\n            <$> strOption\\n                ( long \\\"shell\\\"\\n                    <> metavar \\\"SHELL\\\"\\n                    <> help \\\"prompt the stdout of a shell command\\\"\\n                )\\n\\nparseMcpServer :: Parser Command\\nparseMcpServer =\\n    pure McpServer\\n\\nparseSessionPrintCommand :: Parser Command\\nparseSessionPrintCommand =\\n    SessionPrint <$> parseSessionPrintOptions\\n\\nparseSessionPrintOptions :: Parser SessionPrint.SessionPrintOptions\\nparseSessionPrintOptions =\\n    SessionPrint.SessionPrintOptions\\n        <$> strArgument\\n            ( metavar \\\"SESSIONFILE\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Path to the session JSON file to print\\\"\\n            )\\n        <*> switch\\n            ( long \\\"show-tool-call-results\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Show the results of tool calls in the output\\\"\\n            )\\n        <*> optional\\n            ( option auto\\n                ( long \\\"n-turns\\\"\\n                    <> metavar \\\"N\\\"\\n                    <> help \\\"Limit output to the first N turns (no limit if not specified)\\\"\\n                    <> showDefault\\n                )\\n            )\\n        <*> switch\\n            ( long \\\"repeat-system-prompt\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Repeat the system prompt at each turn (default: False, always shown in first turn)\\\"\\n            )\\n        <*> switch\\n            ( long \\\"repeat-tools\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Repeat the available tools at each turn (default: False, always shown in first turn)\\\"\\n            )\\n        <*> flag\\n            SessionPrint.Chronological\\n            SessionPrint.Antichronological\\n            ( long \\\"antichronological\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Display session steps in antichronological order (newest first). Default is chronological (oldest first).\\\"\\n            )\\n\\nparseInitializeCommand :: Parser Command\\nparseInitializeCommand =\\n    pure Initialize\\n\\nparseSelfDescribeCommand :: Parser Command\\nparseSelfDescribeCommand =\\n    pure SelfDescribe\\n\\n-- | Parse the export command\\nparseExportCommand :: Parser Command\\nparseExportCommand =\\n    Export <$> parseExportOptions\\n\\nparseExportOptions :: Parser ExportOptions\\nparseExportOptions =\\n    ExportOptions\\n        <$> parseExportSource\\n        <*> parseExportDestination\\n        <*> optional parseArchiveFormat\\n        <*> optional parseNamespace\\n        <*> parseIncludeTools\\n        <*> parseIncludeMcp\\n        <*> optional parseGitExportOptions\\n\\nparseExportSource :: Parser ExportSource\\nparseExportSource =\\n    asum\\n        [ flag' ExportCurrentTools\\n            ( long \\\"tools-only\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Export only tools, not the agent configuration\\\"\\n            )\\n        , ExportToolByName <$> strOption\\n            ( long \\\"tool\\\"\\n                <> metavar \\\"TOOLNAME\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Export a specific tool by name\\\"\\n            )\\n        , flag' ExportAllAgents\\n            ( long \\\"all\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Export all loaded agents\\\"\\n            )\\n        , ExportAgentBySlug <$> strOption\\n            ( long \\\"agent-slug\\\"\\n                <> metavar \\\"SLUG\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Export agent by slug\\\"\\n            )\\n        , pure ExportCurrentAgent\\n        ]\\n\\nparseExportDestination :: Parser ExportDestination\\nparseExportDestination =\\n    asum\\n        [ ExportToGit <$> parseGitExportDest\\n        , ExportToFile <$> strOption\\n            ( long \\\"output\\\"\\n                <> short 'o'\\n                <> metavar \\\"OUTPUT\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Output file path\\\"\\n            )\\n        ]\\n\\nparseGitExportDest :: Parser GitExportDest\\nparseGitExportDest =\\n    GitExportDest\\n        <$> strOption\\n            ( long \\\"git-url\\\"\\n                <> metavar \\\"URL\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Git remote URL\\\"\\n            )\\n        <*> optional (strOption\\n            ( long \\\"git-branch\\\"\\n                <> metavar \\\"BRANCH\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Git branch\\\"\\n            ))\\n        <*> optional (strOption\\n            ( long \\\"git-message\\\"\\n                <> metavar \\\"MESSAGE\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Git commit message\\\"\\n            ))\\n        <*> switch\\n            ( long \\\"git-push\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Push to remote after commit\\\"\\n            )\\n        <*> optional (strOption\\n            ( long \\\"git-tag\\\"\\n                <> metavar \\\"TAG\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Git tag to create\\\"\\n            ))\\n\\nparseGitExportOptions :: Parser GitExportOptions\\nparseGitExportOptions =\\n    GitExportOptions\\n        <$> strOption\\n            ( long \\\"git-url\\\"\\n                <> metavar \\\"URL\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Git remote URL\\\"\\n            )\\n        <*> optional (strOption\\n            ( long \\\"git-branch\\\"\\n                <> metavar \\\"BRANCH\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Git branch\\\"\\n            ))\\n        <*> (fromMaybe \\\"Update agent configurations\\\" <$> optional (strOption\\n            ( long \\\"git-message\\\"\\n                <> metavar \\\"MESSAGE\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Git commit message\\\"\\n                <> value \\\"Update agent configurations\\\"\\n            )))\\n        <*> switch\\n            ( long \\\"git-push\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Push to remote after commit\\\"\\n            )\\n        <*> optional (strOption\\n            ( long \\\"git-tag\\\"\\n                <> metavar \\\"TAG\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Git tag to create\\\"\\n            ))\\n\\nparseArchiveFormat :: Parser ExportImport.ArchiveFormat\\nparseArchiveFormat =\\n    option (maybeReader parseFormat)\\n        ( long \\\"format\\\"\\n            <> metavar \\\"FORMAT\\\"\\n            <> help \\\"Archive format: tar, tar.gz, zip (auto-detected from output if not specified)\\\"\\n        )\\n  where\\n    parseFormat :: String -> Maybe ExportImport.ArchiveFormat\\n    parseFormat \\\"tar\\\" = Just ExportImport.TarFormat\\n    parseFormat \\\"tar.gz\\\" = Just ExportImport.TarGzFormat\\n    parseFormat \\\"zip\\\" = Just ExportImport.ZipFormat\\n    parseFormat _ = Nothing\\n\\nparseNamespace :: Parser Text\\nparseNamespace =\\n    strOption\\n        ( long \\\"namespace\\\"\\n            <> metavar \\\"NAMESPACE\\\"\\n            <> help \\\"Namespace for export (e.g., 'team-a.project')\\\"\\n        )\\n\\nparseIncludeTools :: Parser Bool\\nparseIncludeTools =\\n    not <$> switch\\n        ( long \\\"no-tools\\\"\\n            <> help \\\"Exclude tools from export\\\"\\n        )\\n\\nparseIncludeMcp :: Parser Bool\\nparseIncludeMcp =\\n    not <$> switch\\n        ( long \\\"no-mcp\\\"\\n            <> help \\\"Exclude MCP servers from export\\\"\\n        )\\n\\n-- | Parse the import command\\nparseImportCommand :: Parser Command\\nparseImportCommand =\\n    Import <$> parseImportOptions\\n\\nparseImportOptions :: Parser ImportOptions\\nparseImportOptions =\\n    ImportOptions\\n        <$> parseImportSource\\n        <*> parseImportDestination\\n        <*> optional parseNamespace\\n        <*> parseImportMode\\n        <*> parseImportToolsOnly\\n        <*> parseListNamespaces\\n        <*> parseListTools\\n\\nparseImportSource :: Parser ImportSource\\nparseImportSource =\\n    asum\\n        [ ImportFromGit <$> parseGitImportSource\\n        , ImportFromFile <$> strOption\\n            ( long \\\"from-file\\\"\\n                <> short 'f'\\n                <> metavar \\\"FILE\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Import from archive file\\\"\\n            )\\n        ]\\n\\nparseGitImportSource :: Parser GitImportSource\\nparseGitImportSource =\\n    GitImportSource\\n        <$> strOption\\n            ( long \\\"git-url\\\"\\n                <> metavar \\\"URL\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Git remote URL\\\"\\n            )\\n        <*> optional (strOption\\n            ( long \\\"git-ref\\\"\\n                <> metavar \\\"REF\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Git ref (branch, tag, or commit)\\\"\\n            ))\\n        <*> optional (strOption\\n            ( long \\\"namespace\\\"\\n                <> metavar \\\"NAMESPACE\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Namespace to import from\\\"\\n            ))\\n\\nparseImportDestination :: Parser ExportInstall.ImportDestination\\nparseImportDestination =\\n    asum\\n        [ flag' ExportInstall.ImportToCurrentDir\\n            ( long \\\"to-current\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Import to current directory\\\"\\n            )\\n        , ExportInstall.ImportToPath <$> strOption\\n            ( long \\\"to\\\"\\n                <> metavar \\\"PATH\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Import to specific path\\\"\\n            )\\n        , flag' ExportInstall.ImportToConfigDir\\n            ( long \\\"to-config-dir\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Import to config directory\\\"\\n            )\\n        , ExportInstall.ImportToAgent <$> strOption\\n            ( long \\\"install-to-agent\\\"\\n                <> metavar \\\"AGENTFILE\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Install tools to agent's tool directory\\\"\\n            )\\n        , ExportInstall.ImportToToolDir <$> strOption\\n            ( long \\\"install-to-tooldir\\\"\\n                <> metavar \\\"TOOLDIR\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Install tools to specific tool directory\\\"\\n            )\\n        , pure ExportInstall.ImportToCurrentDir\\n        ]\\n\\nparseImportMode :: Parser ImportMode\\nparseImportMode =\\n    asum\\n        [ flag' ImportOverwrite\\n            ( long \\\"overwrite\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Overwrite existing files on conflict\\\"\\n            )\\n        , flag' ImportMerge\\n            ( long \\\"merge\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"Merge with existing files\\\"\\n            )\\n        , pure ImportFailOnConflict\\n        ]\\n\\nparseImportToolsOnly :: Parser Bool\\nparseImportToolsOnly =\\n    switch\\n        ( long \\\"tools-only\\\"\\n            <> help \\\"Import only tools\\\"\\n        )\\n\\nparseListNamespaces :: Parser Bool\\nparseListNamespaces =\\n    switch\\n        ( long \\\"list-namespaces\\\"\\n            <> help \\\"List available namespaces in git repo\\\"\\n        )\\n\\nparseListTools :: Parser Bool\\nparseListTools =\\n    switch\\n        ( long \\\"list-tools\\\"\\n            <> help \\\"List available tools in git repo\\\"\\n        )\\n\\nparseProgOptions :: ArgParserArgs -> Parser Prog\\nparseProgOptions argparserargs =\\n    Prog\\n        <$> strOption\\n            ( long \\\"api-keys\\\"\\n                <> metavar \\\"AGENTS-KEY\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"path to json-file containing API keys\\\"\\n                <> showDefault\\n                <> value (secretsKeyFile argparserargs)\\n            )\\n        <*> strOption\\n            ( long \\\"log-file\\\"\\n                <> metavar \\\"LOGFILE\\\"\\n                <> help \\\"raw log file\\\"\\n                <> showDefault\\n                <> value \\\"agents-logfile\\\"\\n                <> (maybe mempty value argparserargs.defaultLogRawFilepath)\\n            )\\n        <*> optional\\n            ( strOption\\n                ( long \\\"log-http\\\"\\n                    <> metavar \\\"LOGHTTP\\\"\\n                    <> help \\\"http log sink\\\"\\n                    <> showDefault\\n                    <> (maybe mempty value argparserargs.defaultLogJsonHttpEndpoint)\\n                )\\n            )\\n        <*> optional\\n            ( strOption\\n                ( long \\\"log-json-file\\\"\\n                    <> metavar \\\"JSONFILE\\\"\\n                    <> help \\\"local JSON file log sink\\\"\\n                    <> (maybe mempty value argparserargs.defaultLogJsonFilepath)\\n                )\\n            )\\n        <*> optional\\n            ( strOption\\n                ( long \\\"session-json-file-prefix\\\"\\n                    <> metavar \\\"SESSIONSJSONPREFIX\\\"\\n                    <> help \\\"local JSON sessions file prefix\\\"\\n                    <> (maybe mempty value argparserargs.defaultLogSesionsJsonPrefix)\\n                )\\n            )\\n        <*> fmap\\n            (addDefaultAgentFiles argparserargs)\\n            ( many\\n                ( strOption\\n                    ( long \\\"agent-file\\\"\\n                        <> metavar \\\"AGENTFILE\\\"\\n                        <> help (unlines [\\\"root agent(s) description files\\\", \\\"defaults to 'agent.json'\\\", \\\"multi-support vary from command to command\\\"])\\n                    )\\n                )\\n            )\\n        <*> hsubparser\\n            ( command \\\"check\\\" (info parseCheckCommand (idm))\\n                <> command \\\"tui\\\" (info parseTuiChatCommand (idm))\\n                <> command \\\"run\\\" (info parseOneShotTextualCommand (idm))\\n                <> command \\\"echo-prompt\\\" (info parseEchoPromptCommand (idm))\\n                <> command \\\"describe\\\" (info parseSelfDescribeCommand (idm))\\n                <> command \\\"init\\\" (info parseInitializeCommand (idm))\\n                <> command \\\"mcp-server\\\" (info parseMcpServer (idm))\\n                <> command \\\"session-print\\\" (info parseSessionPrintCommand (progDesc \\\"Print a session file in markdown format\\\"))\\n                <> command \\\"export\\\" (info parseExportCommand \\n                    (progDesc \\\"Export agent/tool configurations\\\"))\\n                <> command \\\"import\\\" (info parseImportCommand\\n                    (progDesc \\\"Import agent/tool configurations\\\"))\\n            )\\n\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n-- Main Entry Point\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n\\nmain :: IO ()\\nmain = do\\n    hSetBuffering stderr LineBuffering\\n    hSetBuffering stdout LineBuffering\\n    argzparam <- initArgParserArgs\\n    prog =<< execParser (infoProg argzparam)\\n  where\\n    infoProg argzparam =\\n        info\\n            (parseProgOptions argzparam <**> helper)\\n            ( fullDesc\\n                <> progDesc \\\"Your favorite agent framework.\\\"\\n                <> header \\\"hi\\\"\\n            )\\n\\n    traceExtra :: Prod.Tracer IO a -> Maybe (Prod.Tracer IO a) -> Prod.Tracer IO a\\n    traceExtra t1 Nothing = t1\\n    traceExtra t1 (Just t2) = Prod.traceBoth t1 t2\\n\\n    prog :: Prog -> IO ()\\n    prog pargs = do\\n        showFileTracer <- makeShowLogFileTracer pargs.logFile\\n        baseJsonFileTracer1 <- traverse makeFileJsonTracer pargs.logJsonFile\\n        let logFileJsonTracer =\\n                case baseJsonFileTracer1 of\\n                    Nothing -> Nothing\\n                    Just t -> Just $ choose (maybeToEither . toJsonTrace) Prod.silent t\\n        baseHttpTracer1 <- traverse (makeHttpJsonTrace Prod.silent . Text.pack) pargs.logHttp\\n        let logHttpTracer =\\n                case baseHttpTracer1 of\\n                    Nothing -> Nothing\\n                    Just t -> Just $ choose (maybeToEither . toJsonTrace) Prod.silent t\\n\\n        let baseTracer = showFileTracer `traceExtra` logHttpTracer `traceExtra` logFileJsonTracer\\n\\n        -- Initialize SessionStore from the session prefix argument\\n        let sessionStore = maybe SessionStore.defaultSessionStore SessionStore.mkSessionStore pargs.sessionsJsonPrefix\\n\\n        case pargs.mainCommand of\\n            Check -> do\\n                apiKeys <- AgentTree.readOpenApiKeysFile pargs.apiKeysFile\\n                forM_ pargs.agentFiles $ \\\\agentFile -> do\\n                    -- Create a new runtime registry for this agent tree\\n                    registry <- AgentTree.newRuntimeRegistry\\n                    -- Use silent tracer to suppress diagnostic output during agent loading\\n                    AgentTree.withAgentTreeRuntime\\n                        AgentTree.Props\\n                            { AgentTree.apiKeys = apiKeys\\n                            , AgentTree.rootAgentFile = agentFile\\n                            , AgentTree.interactiveTracer = Prod.silent\\n                            , AgentTree.agentToTool = OneShotTool.turnAgentRuntimeIntoIOTool sessionStore\\n                            , AgentTree.runtimeRegistry = registry\\n                            }\\n                        $ \\\\result -> case result of\\n                            AgentTree.Errors errs -> mapM_ print errs\\n                            AgentTree.Initialized tree -> printAgentCheck tree\\n            TerminalUI _ -> do\\n                apiKeys <- AgentTree.readOpenApiKeysFile pargs.apiKeysFile\\n                let oneAgent agentFile = do\\n                        registry <- AgentTree.newRuntimeRegistry\\n                        pure $ AgentTree.Props\\n                            { AgentTree.apiKeys = apiKeys\\n                            , AgentTree.rootAgentFile = agentFile\\n                            , AgentTree.interactiveTracer =\\n                                Prod.traceBoth\\n                                    baseTracer\\n                                    (traceWaitingOpenAIRateLimits (OpenAI.ApiLimits 100 10000) print)\\n                            , AgentTree.agentToTool = OneShotTool.turnAgentRuntimeIntoIOTool sessionStore\\n                            , AgentTree.runtimeRegistry = registry\\n                            }\\n                -- Use traverse to sequence the IO actions for creating Props\\n                agentPropsList <- traverse oneAgent pargs.agentFiles\\n                TUI.runTUI sessionStore agentPropsList\\n            EchoPrompt opts -> do\\n                promptContents <- interpretPromptScript opts.promptScript\\n                Text.putStr promptContents\\n            OneShot opts -> do\\n                apiKeys <- AgentTree.readOpenApiKeysFile pargs.apiKeysFile\\n                forM_ (take 1 pargs.agentFiles) $ \\\\agentFile -> do\\n                    promptContents <- interpretPromptScript opts.promptScript\\n                    mSession <- maybe (pure Nothing) SessionStore.readSessionFromFile opts.sessionFile\\n                    registry <- AgentTree.newRuntimeRegistry\\n                    let oneShot text props = OneShot.mainOneShotText sessionStore opts.sessionFile mSession props text\\n                    oneShot promptContents $\\n                        AgentTree.Props\\n                            { AgentTree.apiKeys = apiKeys\\n                            , AgentTree.rootAgentFile = agentFile\\n                            , AgentTree.interactiveTracer = baseTracer\\n                            , AgentTree.agentToTool = OneShotTool.turnAgentRuntimeIntoIOTool sessionStore\\n                            , AgentTree.runtimeRegistry = registry\\n                            }\\n            SelfDescribe -> do\\n                -- verify the api-key file exists at least\\n                _ <- AgentTree.readOpenApiKeysFile pargs.apiKeysFile\\n                Aeson.encodeFile \\\"/dev/stdout\\\" $\\n                    Bash.ScriptInfo\\n                        [ Bash.ScriptArg\\n                            \\\"prompt\\\"\\n                            \\\"the prompt to call the agent with\\\"\\n                            \\\"string\\\"\\n                            \\\"string\\\"\\n                            Bash.Single\\n                            Bash.DashDashSpace\\n                        ]\\n                        \\\"self_call\\\"\\n                        \\\"calls oneself with a prompt\\\"\\n                        (Just $ Bash.AddMessage \\\"--no output--\\\")\\n            McpServer -> do\\n                apiKeys <- AgentTree.readOpenApiKeysFile pargs.apiKeysFile\\n                let oneAgent agentFile = do\\n                        registry <- AgentTree.newRuntimeRegistry\\n                        pure $ AgentTree.Props\\n                            { AgentTree.apiKeys = apiKeys\\n                            , AgentTree.rootAgentFile = agentFile\\n                            , AgentTree.interactiveTracer =\\n                                Prod.traceBoth\\n                                    baseTracer\\n                                    ( Prod.traceBoth\\n                                        traceUsefulPromptStderr\\n                                        (traceWaitingOpenAIRateLimits (OpenAI.ApiLimits 100 10000) (\\\\_ -> pure ()))\\n                                    )\\n                            , AgentTree.agentToTool = OneShotTool.turnAgentRuntimeIntoIOTool sessionStore\\n                            , AgentTree.runtimeRegistry = registry\\n                            }\\n                -- Use traverse to sequence the IO actions for creating Props\\n                agentPropsList <- traverse oneAgent pargs.agentFiles\\n                McpServer.multiAgentsServer McpServer.defaultMcpServerConfig agentPropsList\\n            Initialize ->\\n                let o =\\n                        Agent\\n                            { slug = \\\"main-agent\\\"\\n                            , apiKeyId = \\\"main-key\\\"\\n                            , flavor = \\\"OpenAIv1\\\"\\n                            , modelUrl = \\\"https://api.openai.com/v1\\\"\\n                            , modelName = \\\"gpt-4-turbo\\\"\\n                            , announce = \\\"a helpful pupper-master capable of orchestrating other agents ensuring\\\"\\n                            , toolDirectory = \\\"tools\\\"\\n                            , systemPrompt =\\n                                [ \\\"You are a helpful software agent trying to solve user requests\\\"\\n                                , \\\"Your preferred action mode is to act as a puppet master capable of driving other agents.\\\"\\n                                , \\\"You can prompt other agents via tools by passing them a prompt using a JSON payload.\\\"\\n                                , \\\"You efficiently single-shot prompt other agents to efficiently use your token buget.\\\"\\n                                , \\\"You only provide prompt examples when you think other agents may benefit.\\\"\\n                                , \\\"You notify users as you progress\\\"\\n                                , \\\"If an agent fails, do not retry and abdicate\\\"\\n                                ]\\n                            , mcpServers = Just []\\n                            , openApiToolboxes = Nothing\\n                            , extraAgents = Nothing\\n                            }\\n                 in do\\n                        forM_ (take 1 pargs.agentFiles) $ \\\\agentFile -> do\\n                            InitProject.initAgentFile o agentFile\\n                            InitProject.initAgentTooldir o agentFile\\n                            InitProject.initKeyFile pargs.apiKeysFile\\n            SessionPrint opts -> do\\n                SessionPrint.handleSessionPrint opts\\n            Export opts -> handleExport opts pargs\\n            Import opts -> handleImport opts\\n\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n-- Export Handler\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n\\nhandleExport :: ExportOptions -> Prog -> IO ()\\nhandleExport opts pargs = do\\n    -- Determine archive format\\n    let archiveFormat = case (opts.exportDestination, opts.exportFormat) of\\n            (ExportToFile path, Nothing) -> fromMaybe ExportImport.TarGzFormat (ExportImport.detectArchiveFormat path)\\n            (_, Just fmt) -> fmt\\n            (_, Nothing) -> ExportImport.TarGzFormat\\n    \\n    -- Build export package\\n    ePackage <- buildExportPackage opts pargs\\n    \\n    case ePackage of\\n        Left err -> do\\n            Text.hPutStrLn stderr $ \\\"Export error: \\\" <> err\\n            exitFailure\\n        Right pkg -> do\\n            case opts.exportDestination of\\n                ExportToFile path -> do\\n                    result <- ExportImport.exportToArchive pkg archiveFormat path\\n                    case result of\\n                        Left err -> do\\n                            Text.hPutStrLn stderr $ \\\"Export failed: \\\" <> Text.pack (show err)\\n                            exitFailure\\n                        Right () -> do\\n let gitOpts = ExportImport.GitExportOptions\\n                            { ExportImport.gitCommitMessage = fromMaybe \\\"Update agent configurations\\\" gitDest.gitCommitMessage\\n export failed: \\\" <> Text.pack (show err)\\n                            exitFailure\\n                        Right () -> do\\n                            Text.putStrLn \\\"Exported to git repository\\\"\\n                            when gitDest.gitPush $ Text.putStrLn \\\"Changes pushed to remote\\\"\\n                            exitSuccess\\n\\n-- Helper to parse namespace text to pure $ Left err\\n                        Right agent -> do\\n                            -- Load agent tools\\n                            tools <- if opts.exportIncludeTools\\n                                then loadToolsForAgent agentFile agent\\n                                else pure []\\n                            \\n                            let agentExport = ExportImport.ExportPackage\\n                                { ExportImport.packageMetadata = metadata\\n                                , ExportImport.packageAgents = [agentExport]\\n (\\\\m -> ExportImport.McpServerExport m opts.exportNamespace)) (mcpServers agent)\\n                                    else []\\n                                }\\n        \\n pargs.agentFiles\\n            \\n            pure $ Right $ ExportImport.ExportPackage\\n                { ExportImport.packageMetadata = metadata\\n                , ExportImport.packageAgents = [a | Just a <- agentExports]\\n                , ExportImport.packageTools = []\\n                , ExportImport.packageMcpServers = []\\n                }\\n        \\n        ExportAgentBySlug targetSlug -> do\\n            -- Find agent with matching slug\\n            agents <- mapM loadAgentFromFile pargs.agentFiles\\n            case [a | Right a <- agents, targetSlug == slug a] of\\n                [] -> pure $ Left $ \\\"Agent with slug '\\\" <> targetSlug <> \\\"' not found\\\"\\n                (agent:_) -> do\\n                    let agentFile = case [f | (f, Right a) <- zip pargs.agentFiles agents, slug a == targetSlug] of\\n                            (f:_) -> f\\n                            [] -> case pargs.agentFiles of\\n                                (first:_) -> first\\n                                [] -> error \\\"No agent files available\\\"\\n                    tools <- if opts.exportIncludeTools\\n                        then loadToolsForAgent agentFile agent\\n                        else pure []\\n                    \\n                    pure $ Right $ ExportImport.ExportPackage\\n                        { ExportImport.packageMetadata = metadata\\n                        , ExportImport.packageAgents = \\n                            [ ExportImport.AgentExport\\n                                { ExportImport.agentConfig = agent\\n                                , ExportImport.agentNamespace = opts.exportNamespace\\n                                , ExportImport.agentTools = tools\\n                                }\\n                            ]\\n                        , ExportImport.packageTools = []\\n                        , ExportImport.packageMcpServers = if opts.exportIncludeMcp\\n                            then maybe [] (map (\\\\m -> ExportImport.McpServerExport m opts.exportNamespace)) (mcpServers agent)\\n                            else []\\n                        }\\n        \\n        ExportCurrentTools -> do\\n            -- Export tools from current agent\\n            case pargs.agentFiles of\\n                [] -> pure $ Left \\\"No agent file specified\\\"\\n                (agentFile:_) -> do\\n                    eAgent <- loadAgentFromFile agentFile\\n                    case eAgent of\\n                        Left err -> pure $ Left err\\n                        Right agent -> do\\n                            standaloneTools <- loadStandaloneToolsForAgent agentFile agent\\n                            pure $ Right $ ExportImport.ExportPackage\\n                                { ExportImport.packageMetadata = metadata\\n                                , ExportImport.packageAgents = []\\n                                , ExportImport.packageTools = standaloneTools\\n                                , ExportImport.packageMcpServers = []\\n                                }\\n        \\n        ExportToolByName toolName -> do\\n            -- Find and export specific tool\\n            case pargs.agentFiles of\\n                [] -> pure $ Left \\\"No agent file specified\\\"\\n                (agentFile:_) -> do\\n                    eAgent <- loadAgentFromFile agentFile\\n                    case eAgent of\\n                        Left err -> pure $ Left err\\n                        Right agent -> do\\n                            standaloneTools <- loadStandaloneToolsForAgent agentFile agent\\n                            case [t | t <- standaloneTools, (Bash.scriptSlug . ExportImport.standaloneToolInfo) t == toolName] of\\n                                [] -> pure $ Left $ \\\"Tool '\\\" <> toolName <> \\\"' not found\\\"\\n                                (tool:_) -> pure $ Right $ ExportImport.ExportPackage\\n                                    { ExportImport.packageMetadata = metadata\\n                                    , ExportImport.packageAgents = []\\n                                    , ExportImport.packageTools = [tool]\\n                                    , ExportImport.packageMcpServers = []\\n                                    }\\n\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n-- Import Handler\\n-------------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n\\nhandleImport :: ImportOptions -> IO ()\\nhandleImport opts\\n    | importListNamespaces opts = handleListNamespaces opts\\n    | importListTools opts = handleListTools opts\\n    | otherwise = do\\n        -- Perform import\\n        eResult <- case importSource opts of\\n            ImportFromFile path -> do\\n                if importToolsOnly opts\\n                    then do\\n                        ePkg <- ExportImport.importToolsFromArchive path\\n                        case ePkg of\\n                            Left err -> pure $ Left $ Text.pack $ show err\\n                            Right pkg -> do\\n                                let installOpts = ExportInstall.InstallOptions\\n                                        { ExportInstall.installForce = importMode opts == ImportOverwrite || importMode opts == ImportMerge\\n                                        , ExportInstall.installLink = False\\n                                        , ExportInstall.installPrefix = importNamespace opts\\n                                        }\\n                                result <- ExportInstall.importToolPackage pkg (importDestination opts) installOpts\\n                                case result of\\n                                    Left err -> pure $ Left $ Text.pack $ show err\\n                                    Right () -> pure $ Right ()\\n                    else do\\n                        ePkg <- ExportImport.importFromArchive path\\n                        case ePkg of\\n                            Left err -> pure $ Left $ Text.pack $ show err\\n                            Right _pkg -> do\\n
